lint.output: 1 pre-existing warning in flow-canvas.tsx (unused import) — known acceptable per LEARNINGS.md

build.output: Build gate handled post-merge by pipeline

unit_tests.output: No unit tests for UI pages

notes: Implemented perspective comparison view at /w/[workspaceId]/perspectives/compare. Server page fetches all perspectives + element lookup map (steps/sections/stages/touchpoints with tab_id). Client view has two perspective dropdowns, fetches annotations client-side via fetchAnnotations(), builds comparison table with divergence highlighting (DIVERGENCE_THRESHOLD=2). Summary stats panel shows annotation counts, avg ratings, divergence count, top 3 most divergent elements as navigation links. Element names link to /w/{workspaceId}/{tabId}. PDF export uses jsPDF (dynamically imported from local export-pdf.ts), writes title page + per-perspective stats + comparison table with amber row tinting for divergent rows. Sidebar updated with Eye icon and Perspectives nav item positioned after Compare. workspace-shell.tsx exclusion list updated with 'perspectives'. Workflows active check updated to also exclude /perspectives path. Caught and fixed JSX text em dash issue (literal \u2014 in text nodes rendered as literal characters) — replaced with JSX expression {em-dash}.
